title: fumaria grandiflora
intro: Fumaria grandiflora, also known as large-flowered fumitory, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting digestive health. Fumaria grandiflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
